viewpoints.title: With Garnett's Line
viewpoints.editorialNote: Representative unnamed soldier viewpoint; not an identified witness. The observer rides formation slot 184 of Garnett's brigade through the same deterministic reconstruction as every rendered figure. Editorial exemption ED-22: this slot is excluded from procedural victim selection so the viewpoint can witness its full window; the unit's casualty totals are unchanged. viewKind records the Gate P9 camera-style choice (first_person is the executor's recommendation until the owner picks between the rendered candidates).

viewpoints.title: Dev: timecode proxy (Phase 1 media contract)
viewpoints.editorialNote: Phase 1 media-contract proof. Synthetic timecode video generated by reconstruction/scripts/generate_dev_proxy.sh; no historical content. Window t=8160..8170 sits at the start of the planned garnett-road-to-angle viewpoint.
